description: Generate a strand-specific RNA-seq coverage workflow bash script: forward- and reverse-strand bigWig tracks via bamCoverage with --filterRNAstrand and CPM normalization (binSize 1, never --extendReads).
rules: read-only — emits a bash script template; never runs deepTools or touches sequencing data
RNASEQ_BAM is the aligned RNA-seq BAM
all vars optional — unset ones use the generator's safe defaults
filenames are sanitized (no shell metacharacters, no '..' segments) before interpolation
never extends reads (would span splice junctions); --filterRNAstrand assumes dUTP-style reverse-stranded libraries
usage: Optionally set RNASEQ_BAM, THREADS. Output: rnaseq_coverage.sh (a customizable bash workflow to review and run separately).
limitation: Produces a template script only. Running it requires deepTools 3.5.6 installed (bamCoverage). Forward/reverse labels invert for libraries where read 1 follows the RNA strand. Paths must satisfy the sanitizer pattern [A-Za-z0-9._/-].
